questions.text: Which Azure service or capability is BEST to trigger code from HTTP requests?
questions.explanation: Functions scale per invocation.

questions.text: Which Azure service or capability is BEST to containerize APIs on managed Kubernetes?
questions.explanation: AKS runs containerized services.

questions.text: Which Azure offering should you use to trigger code from HTTP requests?
questions.explanation: Functions scale per invocation.

questions.text: What is the recommended Azure approach to trigger code from HTTP requests?
questions.explanation: Functions scale per invocation.

questions.explanation: Functions scale per invocation.

questions.text: Which Azure offering should you use to containerize APIs on managed Kubernetes?
questions.explanation: AKS runs containerized services.

questions.explanation: AKS runs containerized services.

questions.explanation: AKS runs containerized services.

questions.explanation: AKS runs containerized services.

questions.explanation: AKS runs containerized services. Compare with Azure Functions with HTTP trigger: Functions scale per invocation.

questions.explanation: AKS runs containerized services.

questions.text: Your team must trigger code from HTTP requests (variant 2). Which Azure option fits best?
questions.explanation: Functions scale per invocation.
